repos.description: LangChain4j is an idiomatic, open-source Java library for building LLM-powered applications on the JVM. It offers a unified API over popular LLM providers and vector stores, and makes implementing tool calling (including MCP support), agents and RAG easy. It integrates seamlessly with enterprise Java frameworks like Quarkus and Spring Boot.
ACI.dev is the open source tool-calling platform that hooks up 600+ tools into any agentic IDE or custom AI agent through direct function calling or a unified MCP server. The birthplace of VibeOps.
Demystify AI agents by building them yourself. Local LLMs, no black boxes, real understanding of function calling, memory, and ReAct patterns.
🤖 Type-safe, provider-agnostic TypeScript AI SDK for streaming chat, tool calling, agents, and multimodal apps across OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, React, Vue, Svelte, and Solid.

编程导航 AI 开发实战新项目，基于 Spring Boot 3 + Java 21 + Spring AI 构建 AI 恋爱大师应用和 ReAct 模式自主规划智能体YuManus，覆盖 AI 大模型接入、Spring AI 核心特性、Prompt 工程和优化、RAG 检索增强、向量数据库、Tool Calling 工具调用、MCP 模型上下文协议、AI Agent 开发（Manas Java 实现）、Cursor AI 工具等核心知识。用一套教程将程序员必知必会的 AI 技术一网打尽，帮你成为 AI 时代企业的香饽饽，给你的简历和求职大幅增加竞争力。
TypeScript AI AI Function Calling Framework enhanced by compiler skills.
AI-native workspace for local shells and remote machines.Zero Electron, zero OpenSSL, zero telemetry, and no app subscription.
🌍 AppWorld: A Controllable World of Apps and People for Benchmarking Function Calling and Interactive Coding Agent, ACL'24 Best Resource Paper.
Vanilla JS web interface for Gemini 2.0 flash-exp  Multimodal API with text, audio, camera, screen inputs and audio responses and function calling
An LLM programming assistant engine built with Go, supporting WebSocket, multi-turn dialogues, tool calling, permission control, and skill extension.
Enterprise-ready Spring AI platform for RAG, tool calling, async ingestion, JWT/RBAC security, and observability.
Open-source toolkit for the QVeris capability routing network: CLI, MCP server, Python SDK, skills, and REST API docs for agents to discover, inspect, call, and audit real-world tools.
基于 OneBot 协议的多功能bot兼开发框架。以llm function calling为核心构建了更智能的功能调用机制。支持不接入QQ纯Live2d桌宠模式
Native LLM inference server for Apple Silicon. OpenAI + Anthropic API compatible. No Python. Includes MLX Core macOS app with chat, agent mode, and tool calling.
Tool calling using MLX Swift across iOS, macOS, and visionOS platforms
Turn your ChatGPT or Claude account into a fully working OpenAI-compatible API. No API keys needed. Supports tool calling, vision, file attachments, and image generation.
Hands-on tutorials for building AI agents from scratch. Learn LLM APIs, prompt engineering, tool calling, and the agent loop through practical examples.
Copilot-style AI coding agent for VS Code, powered by DeepSeek V4.
An example extension in go using function calling and confirmation dialogs
Local control plane for running AI agents with sandboxes, approvals, guardrails, credentials, and runtime health.
AI/LLM tool use (function calling) JSON Schema generator - a Kotlin multiplatform library
STAR: Similarity-guided Teacher-Assisted Refinement for Super-Tiny Function Calling Models
Generative AI library for .NET 9.0 with built-in OpenAI ChatGPT and Google Gemini API clients and support for C# function calling via reflection.
Spring AI agent engineering project with Java, MCP, RAG, tool calling, multimodal workflows, and UI prototypes.

Drop-in OpenAI-compatible API gateway for Qwen AI models. Use your Qwen account (chat.qwen.ai) as a free AI API provider in any OpenAI-compatible client — Cursor, Continue.dev, Claude Code, VS Code Copilot, or any coding agent. Self-hosted, Chromium-based auth, streaming support, tool calling, dashboard.
High-value AI skills repository for Codex, Claude Code, OpenClaw, agents, prompts, and automation workflows.  高价值的 AI 技能库，涵盖 Codex、Claude Code、OpenClaw、代理、提示和自动化工作流程。
Fast local Rust scanner for AI-agent prompt injection, credential leaks, exfiltration, and risky tool calls

A Go toolkit for building AI agents and applications across multiple providers. Unified LLM client, agent framework with handoffs, tool calling, streaming, structured output, MCP integration, and cost tracking.
A lightweight, general-purpose harness for tool-using LLM agents, fair benchmark evaluation, harness baselines, and personal assistant workflows.
Runtime governance for AI agents. Contracts enforce what tools can do — before they execute.
Swift 6 agent SDK: type-safe tools, streaming, cloud + on-device inference via MLX on Apple Silicon

Browser-automation agent for Chrome — natural-language tasks executed through native tool calling, scoped Skills, CDP keyboard control, and a confirm-before-act security model. BYOK across 8 LLM providers (Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek + 4 China-region).
Lightweight Python SDK for LLMs with unified API across 9 providers. Built-in ReAct & Plan-Execute agents, streaming,   native tool calling, context injection, structured outputs, and observability.
Run AI SDK agents in a terminal UI.
TypeScript framework for building AI agents — multi-provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google), tool calling, permissions, hooks, streaming, and CLI coding assistant

Sunona: Next-generation voice AI infrastructure. Orchestrate intelligent, action-oriented voice agents that sound human and execute complex workflows via function calling. The faster way to build the future of talk.
Agentic AI server in Rust. Multi-provider LLM routing, tool calling, RAG, MCP, multi-tenant workflows.
Drive any agent against any W3C WoT Thing from its description. No per-integration server.
一个按版本持续演进的 AI Native Runtime Skeleton。  它从本地聊天闭环起步，逐步演进到：  结构化流式协议 Tool Calling Multi-Tool Runtime Skill Runtime MCP / Agent / 数据层
Python SDK for Scalekit — auth stack for agents. SAML, OIDC, SCIM, MCP Auth, agent auth, tool-calling.
HexClaw — 企业级 AI Agent 后端。多模型对话，RAG 知识库，Tool Call 代理，Skill 系统，MCP 协议，代码沙箱，飞书/钉钉/Telegram 等多平台 IM 接入。Hexagon 生态 L3。

DevWhale —— AI 驱动桌面开发工作台。深度契合Deepseek V4,做了针对性缓存优化。Electron + React + TypeScript，流式 Agent对话、Monaco 编辑器、xterm.js 终端、60+ 文件格式多模态输入、多模型切换。DevWhale — AI desktop dev workbench. Electron + React + TS. Streaming Agent chat,Monaco editor, xterm terminal, 60+ file formats, multi-model support.

Minimal Go agent framework for LLM tool-calling loops. Typed tools, parallel execution, three hooks, streaming progress, snapshot resume. Works with Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT-5, Google Gemini via pi-llm-go.
Hermes Live Discord Agent Plugin — full-duplex Discord voice ↔ Google Gemini Multimodal Live API, with function calling, idle hangup, transcripts, and a 3-min oneshot installer.

Your AI never leaves your laptop. Claudette is a personal AI assistant and coding agent that runs entirely on local hardware - REPL, fullscreen TUI, one-shot CLI, and a Telegram bot, all driving one local model through Ollama or LM Studio. No cloud brain. No API key. No subscription. No telemetry. One Rust binary.
Graph-based tool retrieval for LLM agents — 248 tools → 82% accuracy, 79% fewer tokens. Zero dependencies. OpenAPI / MCP / LangChain.
Go AI Agent 框架 — Go 生态的 LangChain + LangGraph：ReAct / Plan-and-Execute / Reflection / ToT 多范式推理开箱即用，图编排与多 Agent 协作，A2A 协议，OpenTelemetry 可观测。对标字节 Eino。Hexagon 生态 L2 核心。

Full-stack LLM Engineering Lab. Features: Autonomous Agents (ReAct/AutoGPT) | Fine-Tuning Llama/Mistral (SFT/DPO) | Large Model Deployment (DeepSeek 671B / 2.5-bit) | Advanced RAG (Hybrid Search) | Function Calling (Stream/Text-to-SQL/External APIs) | Frameworks (LangChain, Semantic Kernel, OpenAI) | Daily SOTA Paper Tracking. From theory to 0-to-1

This is a project aimed at creating an agent that perpetually thinks and develops itself. It can add entries into an SQLite database and change the structure of that databaase. It also has the ability to search the web when it needs to. It utilizes OpenAI function calling and the responses API. All
一款全面的 Git 仓库分析工具，可扫描代码仓库并生成多维度的开发者洞察报告——涵盖提交模式、工作习惯、开发效率、代码风格和代码质量五大维度。
Open-source authorization gateway for AI agent tool calls. Enforce allow, deny, and approval-required decisions before agents execute tools.
OpenHuskyAgent
A declarative AI agent framework built on RuleGo
Three runnable enterprise AI systems showing secure RAG, governed agents, AI release reliability, evals, traces, audit logs, and approval gates.
Node.js SDK for Scalekit — auth stack for agents. SAML, OIDC, SCIM, MCP Auth, agent auth, tool-calling.
A self-hosted Flask AI assistant with RAG, vision, multi-tool execution, and canvas document editing. Full workflow automation in one open-source platform.

UMMAYA is an open-source conversational multi-agent CLI for Korea's national AX public-service infrastructure, pairing a Claude Code-style harness with K-EXAONE on FriendliAI and LLM-callable civic tools.

Pure-Rust async runtime for LLM agents. Multi-provider (Anthropic/OpenAI/Ollama), tool-capable end-to-end, structured permissions, real MCP support, USD cost tracking, Files API, optional FS+search tool pack.
"Local LLM agent framework in Rust — native tool-role support, tmux session persistence, two-tier summarization, and ShareGPT logging. Works with any OpenAI-compatible backend."
Open source AI agent framework to build the future of data operations.
🧠 Build a flexible, production-ready memory system for AI agents, offering session-only, persistent, or hybrid deployment modes for optimal data handling.

Autonomous AI Agent Infrastructure Platform — OpenAI-compatible AI gateway with MCP support, multi-agent orchestration, tool calling, observability, memory, RAG, AI workflows, and unified infrastructure for any LLM provider.
Gemma 4 powered GIS Data Agent for geospatial NL2Semantic2SQL, farmland optimization, and WorldModel v2.1 planning with native tool calling and memory.

Guardrails watch what AI says. REMORA governs what AI does. A pre-execution governance layer for AI agent tool calls: ACCEPT, VERIFY, ABSTAIN, ESCALATE, with policy, evidence, uncertainty, and an auditable DecisionEnvelope. Research-grade, open source.
A self-improving AI agent with a learning loop, multi-platform messaging gateway, and a paper-themed web dashboard.
Run local LLMs with a browser-based agent harness featuring file system access, shell execution, and development tools for autonomous coding tasks.
Add an AI assistant to any web application in minutes using an embeddable chat widget and MCP-powered backend tools.
Native iOS AI agent in SwiftUI multi-step tool-calling, live streaming responses, and on-device-ready architecture.

Cloud-native, event-driven payment transaction intelligence agent. Ingests simulated payment events, detects anomalies via rules + LLM, and produces automated risk reports through Claude with autonomous tool calling.
Python SDK for building agentic systems - typed tools, dependency injection, structured outputs, and multi-agent swarms, backed by the mAIvn platform.
Local-first trace recorder and searchable HTML viewer for AI agent runs.
A hands-on tutorial for building a Claude Code-style coding agent with tools, memory, hooks, subagents, and plugins.
A small, clear, and extensible multi-user Web Agent — chat, call tools, operate a workspace, browse the web, search for information, with each conversation running in an isolated sandbox.
Local-first agentic inference engine in C/C++. Multi-tier model routing, grammar-constrained output, MCP tool servers. Embeddable via C ABI.
Agent orchestration framework that manages AI workflows through configuration instead of code. Define tools, memory, providers, and execution flow with portable JSON configs.
Powerful Python agent runtime with tools, MCP, Hooks, Skills, Rag, memory, sessions, reasoning, and streaming packets.

Deliver accurate, context-aware AI responses using Granite Agent’s optimized reasoning, live web search, and efficient memory for consumer GPUs.
TypeScript SDK for orchestrating Agentic Systems — concurrency, structured output, cost control, and consensus as first-class primitives.
A local-first CLI AI agent for LM Studio: streaming chat plus sandboxed filesystem, shell, and web tools behind an approval gate.
Lightweight, provider-agnostic agentic tool-use loop for .NET. Define your tools; the engine runs the model/tool loop. A from-scratch reference implementation.
A weather app built with React.js and Open-Meteo API, featuring an embedded  AI agent powered by Gemini 2.0 Flash for natural language weather queries.
ai-agent
A tiny, provider-agnostic framework for building tool-using AI agents in Python. Works with any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
Production-grade safety guide-rails, validation layer, and loop-detection middleware for LLM agents using the Hermes framework.

Phone-first event backbone for live experiences: LLM agent over SMS/iMessage/voice with deterministic tools for check-in, missions, drinks, songs, and a projection board. Built for Dedalus Run(way)time at Lume Studios. Next.js · Vercel · Supabase · AgentPhone · MCP.

Java orchestration library for production LLM apps — build workflows or autonomous agents with tool-calling. 11 native providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Grok, Gemini, DeepSeek, Azure variants) + JSON-driven custom. Multi-instance load-balancing, per-model rate limiting, error-type-aware retries.

Atlas — an agentic trip planner where an open-source LLM composes the UI via Google's A2UI protocol: propose a stop, approve it, watch it pin to a live map. Built on CopilotKit / AG-UI, on Nebius. Adapted from CopilotKit's A2UI PDF Analyst example.
ai agent trace, Open-source runtime tracing and diagnostics for AI agent execution flows
Go agent runtime for tool-using, code-executing, multi-provider agents with MCP support, coding-agent CLI integrations, structured output, summarization, and parallel tool execution.

Autonomous AI research agent — searches the web, reads sources, writes cited reports. CLI + Streamlit UI
Lightweight AI agent for your terminal — connects to DeepSeek API with local tool calling (shell, file ops, search). Simple, handy,  ▎  reliable enough.

Oracle: Autonomous AI coding agent. Reads, writes, edits, searches, and executes code via CLI or web UI. Dual-model routing, persistent memory, and tool creation.

Local-only ReAct research agent on LangGraph + LangChain with BM25 tool selection, parallel execution, and agent-driven rendering -  traced in LangSmith.

Forge your own agent harness — a config-to-code generator that renders a thin, standalone Python agent harness you fully own. No LangChain/LangGraph/ADK lock-in, no dependency on the generator after generation.
Finance-grade tool-calling agent over SEC 10-K filings: exact XBRL numbers (never LLM arithmetic), source citations, structured abstention, and an 8-metric eval suite. LangGraph + pgvector.

Slug Advisor — a deployed tool-calling agent for UCSC course advising: LangGraph ReAct, hybrid retrieval (BM25 + pgvector) + reranker, eval-in-CI, Langfuse observability, MCP server, on GCP Cloud Run.

Hermes plugin to monitor NVIDIA NIM models: live latency + tool-support probing, async concurrent checks, full-screen Textual TUI, and one-shot snapshot mode for AI agents and scripts.

agent-gorgon is a 3-layer hook defense for Claude Code and other agent runtimes that steers an agent toward invoking a registered tool instead of fabricating that tool's output. Combines prompt-time tool injection, finish-time output checking, and a Bash guard against reimplementing registered tools.
Local AI agent with tool calling, powered by Ollama. Plugin system, Policy Engine, dual-licensed (AGPLv3 + commercial).

mcp-toolsmith audits and compiles Python tool schemas for LLM agents, catching vague names, missing argument descriptions, oversized schemas, overlapping tools, and prompt-injection-like metadata before your agent uses them.
Production-shaped AI automation toolkit — typed tool-calling agents, structured-output validation, guardrails, and an eval harness. Runs offline on a mock LLM.
A production-pattern AI voice agent at $0.00/min. One Python file: faster-whisper + Groq free tier + edge-tts. No platform fees.
Rust-native agents runtime with OpenAI, MCP, realtime sessions, voice workflows, and extension hooks.
A personal Windows AI assistant — voice/text in, real PC actions out. Tool-calling agent on Groq + local Ollama, with a safety layer, memory and a desktop UI.

AI command-line agent that manages your Google Tasks through natural language — add, list, complete, and delete tasks by   just talking. Powered by Groq Llama + Google Tasks API. (Under development)

Translates emotional narratives in natural language into mathematically validated playlists, exported as CSV for any streaming platform.
Offline replay and assertion harness for AI agent tool-call transcripts, fixtures, retries, budgets, JUnit reports, and CI gates.

Multi-agent coordination system powered by NVIDIA NIM inference microservices and LangGraph orchestration. Features tool-calling agents with REST API, SQL, and document store integrations — built as a reference for enterprise agentic AI deployment.

A build-time meta-prompting framework for tool-calling LLM agents. Bring a task; it compiles a prompt — in the right structural shape, sections ordered as deliberate operators, audited against a checklist, scored honestly, and shipped with a verifier. No dependencies, no build step.

Use GLM (Z.ai / Zhipu) models — GLM-4.7, GLM-5, GLM-5.1, GLM-5.2, GLM-4.5 Air — inside GitHub Copilot Chat with your own API key (BYOK). Native model-picker integration with thinking mode, tool calling, and agent mode. Coding Plan or Standard API.
